lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in poor condition. It shows significant wear on both the interior and exterior and requires mechanical repairs to be fully operational.
The vehicle is in mint condition. It is mechanically perfect and shows no signs of wear. Both the exterior and interior are in like-new condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant repairs to be safely roadworthy. The exterior shows heavy wear, including several large dents on the side panels, noticeable rust spots along the wheel wells, and significantly faded paint on the hood and roof. Inside, the interior is in rough shape with torn upholstery on the front seats, a sagging headliner, and various broken plastic trim pieces. Mechanically, the car starts but runs roughly, exhibiting a persistent engine knock and a visible oil leak. The suspension is quite worn, and the air conditioning system is currently non-functional. This car is being sold as-is and is recommended only for those looking for a major project or a source for parts.

Start your next adventure with this fantastic vehicle! It’s in good condition and has been consistently cared for, ensuring a smooth and enjoyable driving experience. While you’ll find some light, honest wear from its time on the road, it remains a reliable and attractive choice that's ready for its next owner.

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition and presents exactly as it did when it first left the showroom. The exterior is flawless, with a mirror-like paint finish and no scratches, dents, or chips. Inside, the cabin is pristine; the upholstery shows zero signs of wear, and every feature functions perfectly. Mechanically, the car is impeccable, having been garage-kept and maintained with the highest level of care. It provides a smooth, quiet, and powerful driving experience that feels truly like-new. This is an exceptional example for a buyer who demands perfection.
Fair condition.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This specimen represents the pinnacle of its class, exhibiting a pristine aesthetic and mechanical integrity that satisfies even the most discerning collector. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the immaculate cabin, reflects meticulous preservation. This is a definitive opportunity to acquire a vehicle in peerless condition.

Hey there! I am honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolutely pristine, showroom condition—seriously, it’s like it just rolled off the lot! I’ve babied it since day one, so it’s spotless inside and out and drives like an absolute dream. If you’re looking for something that feels brand new without the brand-new price tag, this is the one for you! Come take it for a spin, you won't be disappointed!

Offered is an exceptional specimen of automotive engineering in peerless condition. This vehicle features a high-compression, naturally aspirated powerplant mated to a close-ratio longitudinal manual transmission, delivering linear torque across the entire rev range. The chassis dynamics are sharpened by a factory-tuned double-wishbone suspension and a mechanical limited-slip differential, ensuring surgical turn-in and corner-exit stability. All mechanical components, from the four-piston monoblock calipers to the reinforced subframe, exhibit zero signs of wear or thermal stress. The engine bay is concours-ready, with original factory markings intact and a drivetrain that operates within exacting tolerances. This is a definitive collector-grade example for the discerning enthusiast seeking peak mechanical integrity.
Mint condition. Zero accidents. Original factory paint. Smoke-free interior. Full service records included. Firm price.

Presenting an absolute masterpiece of automotive preservation: a showroom-quality vehicle that truly defines the 'mint' standard. This car has been fastidiously maintained and kept in a climate-controlled environment since its initial purchase. The exterior finish is breathtaking, featuring original paint with a deep, mirror-like luster, free of any rock chips, swirl marks, or door dings. It has been treated with a multi-stage paint correction and a professional-grade ceramic coating for long-term protection. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule; the premium leather upholstery remains supple with no bolster wear, the dashboard is crack-free, and it still retains that distinctive new-car scent. Every switch, dial, and electronic component functions with factory-spec precision. Mechanically, this vehicle is beyond reproach. It comes with a comprehensive binder of every service record performed at authorized intervals. The engine bay is detailed to a high standard, showing no leaks or corrosion. With exceptionally low mileage and a recent set of premium tires, this car offers a driving experience indistinguishable from a brand-new model. For the collector or enthusiast who accepts nothing less than perfection, this is the one.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard of excellence. This specimen remains in pristine condition, reflecting a level of care that borders on the fastidious. With its flawless exterior and an interior that retains its original showroom luster, this vehicle represents a premier acquisition for the discerning driver. Every mechanical component has been scrutinized to ensure peak performance, offering a driving experience that is virtually indistinguishable from its original state.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, preserved in showroom condition. This unit has undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure it meets the most exacting standards of automotive excellence. Boasting a flawless aesthetic and mechanically superior performance, it represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast. Every detail, from the immaculate interior to the pristine exterior finish, reflects a history of uncompromising maintenance and care.

Hey there! I’m so excited to find a new home for this absolute beauty! Honestly, this car is in such incredible shape, it looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve babied it since day one—it's spotless inside and out, and it drives like a total dream. You seriously have to see it to believe how pristine it is. It's ready for its next big adventure, and I'd love for that to be with you!

This E46 M3 represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering, featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six engine equipped with individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing. Mechanically impeccable, this specimen has undergone documented rod bearing service and proactive rear subframe reinforcement to ensure long-term structural integrity. The Getrag six-speed manual transmission provides tactile, precise shifts, delivering power through a factory M-variable differential lock. The chassis is exceptionally clean with no signs of oxidation, riding on a refreshed suspension setup that maintains original factory geometry. Finished in deep Carbon Black over pristine Nappa leather, this collector-grade vehicle offers a visceral driving experience with its 8,000 RPM redline and perfectly balanced 50/50 weight distribution.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history included.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation. This vehicle is in showroom-fresh condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage since day one. The exterior paint retains its deep, mirror-like luster with zero imperfections, protected by a premium ceramic coating that makes the finish pop. Inside, the cabin remains pristine; the high-grade leather upholstery shows no signs of wear or creasing, and every electronic feature functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. Mechanically, it is flawless, backed by a comprehensive service portfolio and exclusively genuine parts. With incredibly low mileage and a history of careful adult ownership, this car offers the rare opportunity to own a modern classic in its absolute peak state. It drives tight, quiet, and powerful, representing the pinnacle of its model year for the most discerning collector.

Presenting an exceptional vehicle of uncompromising quality, this specimen remains in showroom-standard condition. Meticulously maintained and preserved with the utmost care, it offers a driving experience indistinguishable from new. For the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than perfection, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring a flawless exterior and a mechanical state that reflects rigorous upkeep.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of unrivaled distinction, maintained to a standard that transcends the typical pre-owned market. This specimen exhibits an impeccable exterior finish and a cabin preserved in its original, showroom-fresh state. Every mechanical component has been scrutinized to ensure peak performance, mirroring the vehicle's initial delivery specifications. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than absolute perfection, this offering represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is in absolute mint condition—seriously, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I've babied it since day one, so you're getting a total gem that's been meticulously cared for. It's super clean, incredibly reliable, and ready for its next big adventure with you! Feel free to reach out if you have any questions at all!

This E46 M3 represents a pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering. Power is delivered by the iconic S54 3.2L straight-six, featuring an 11.5:1 compression ratio and individual throttle bodies for instantaneous throttle response. This example is mechanically flawless, with a recently serviced Double VANOS system and a reinforced rear subframe to ensure structural rigidity. The ZF 6-speed manual transmission provides tactile engagement, paired with a M-Variable Differential Lock for optimal corner-exit traction. The chassis remains taut on factory-spec bushings, and the exterior finish is concours-ready. Meticulously maintained with a full service history, this is a true collector-grade specimen for the discerning purist.
Single owner. Garage kept. No scratches or dents. Original paint. Full service history. Showroom condition.

This vehicle is a true time capsule, presented in breathtaking, showroom-quality condition. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with absolutely zero imperfections, protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating that highlights its flawless body lines. Every panel is original and perfectly aligned, with wheels that are entirely free of curb rash or pitting. Inside, the cabin retains its factory-fresh scent; the premium leather upholstery shows no signs of bolster wear, and the dashboard remains pristine without a single crack or blemish. All electronic components, switches, and displays function exactly as they did on day one. Mechanically, this car has been pampered with an open-checkbook maintenance philosophy, documented by a comprehensive service history. It has been strictly garage-kept and never seen a drop of rain, resulting in an undercarriage that is as clean as the top. This is an investment-grade example that drives with the tightness and precision of a brand-new machine.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of unparalleled distinction, maintained to a standard that defies its age. This specimen exhibits an impeccable exterior finish paired with a cabin that remains in showroom-fresh condition. Every mechanical component has been rigorously vetted to ensure peak performance and absolute reliability. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine example of automotive excellence.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This unit represents the pinnacle of its class, boasting a showroom-quality exterior and an interior that remains in a pristine, original state. A rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast seeking a vehicle in truly peerless condition.

Hey there! You honestly won't believe how incredible this car looks—it’s basically like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I've taken such good care of it, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you're looking for something that's practically flawless and ready for a new home, this is the one for you! Come take a look, you're going to love it!

Presenting an investment-grade E46 M3, meticulously maintained to preserve its visceral mechanical character. The S54 inline-six remains in peak factory specification, benefiting from a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and proactive rod bearing replacement. Power is delivered through a crisp Getrag 420G 6-speed manual transmission to a variable M differential lock. The chassis integrity is verified with a reinforced rear subframe, and the suspension retains its original geometry with refreshed bushings and dampers. Zero fluid seepage, flawless compression across all cylinders, and a pristine undercarriage. This is a turn-key example for the discerning collector seeking peak atmospheric performance.
Pristine condition. Zero mechanical issues. Full service history. Like new interior. Serious buyers only.

This vehicle is in truly impeccable, showroom condition, representing the pinnacle of its class. The exterior features a mirror-like finish with deep, lustrous paint that has been protected in a climate-controlled environment, showing zero swirl marks, scratches, or stone chips. Inside, the cabin remains in a time-capsule state; the premium leather seats are supple and free of any wear on the bolsters, and the original factory scent still lingers. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced navigation, operates with precision. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach. It has been maintained with an open-checkbook policy, documented by a complete service history at authorized dealerships. The engine bay is spotless, the transmission shifts are imperceptibly smooth, and the undercarriage is as clean as the bodywork

We are pleased to present this superlative example of automotive engineering, maintained in showroom condition. Every aspect of this vehicle reflects an uncompromising commitment to excellence, from the flawless exterior finish to the meticulously preserved interior. This is an investment-grade acquisition for the discerning driver who demands nothing less than perfection.
